278 FUNDAMENTALS OF \STR()IX)GV
Sagittanus is occupied by Mercury whose Gunakara is 5. Hence
3 s 5 15. In Capricorn there are two planets viz. the Sun and
Venus, in such cases you have to multiply separately the dots
by the Gunakara of each planet and then add the two products.
The Guijakaras of the Sun and Venus are in order 5 and 7. So
the two products are 15 and 21 and their total is 36. What
about the Moon who is in Pisces ? As there arc no benelic
dots left after the conections, there cannot be any figure there
except zero. Now total up these figures which you have obtained
in Aries, Virgo, Scorpio, Sagittarius and Capricorn. !'hc total
is 125. Now add up this figure to the total obtained by Rasi-
gunakara. So 160 j-125«285. Next you will multiply this
figure, 2S5, by 7 and divide the product by 27. The quotient
thus obtained represents the A.V.
